---
title: "Chapter 1: Getting Started"
---

## Introduction

This is the first chapter of the example book. In a real book, this would contain
your content — text, code, figures, and interactive elements.

## Code Examples

Quarto makes it easy to include executable code:

```python
# Example Python code
data = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
total = sum(data)
print(f"Sum: {total}, Mean: {total/len(data)}")
```

## Embedded Artifact

You can embed Claude artifacts directly in chapters:

::: {.claude-artifact}
<div style="padding: 1.5rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e293b, #283548); border-radius: 12px; font-family: system-ui;">
  <h4 style="color: #38bdf8; margin: 0 0 0.75rem 0;">Key Concepts</h4>
  <ul style="color: #e2e8f0; margin: 0; padding-left: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.8;">
    <li>Quarto renders <code>.qmd</code> files to HTML, PDF, and more</li>
    <li>Books are collections of chapters with shared navigation</li>
    <li>Claude artifacts embed as self-contained HTML widgets</li>
  </ul>
</div>
:::
